exercises.title: Write Dimensional Formulas
exercises.content: Write the dimensional formula for: (1) acceleration  (2) force  (3) work/energy. (Hint: start with definitions)

exercises.title: Decode the Formula
exercises.content: What physical quantity has dimensional formula [M L T⁻²]? What about [M L² T⁻²]?
hints: Think about what base units go together
